calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-27-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2006 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2006 Continued To Dec-15-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Chen.
Dennis Miller, Esq. for Plaintiff: Heller First Capital Corporation, a Delaware Corporation.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering the declaration of Alan Buschman, filed on 9-14-06 in support, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Wileharda K. Mbunda, aka Wilharda K. Mbunda, aka Twiga Mbunda, dba TWIGA as follows:
Principal $95,821.08
Prejudgment Interest and Late Fees $10,654.85
Miscellaneous Charges $2,533.07
Attorney's Fees $4,023.90
Costs $385.00, for a total of $113,417.90
Plaintiff is entitled to the possession of the equipment and items as listed in the Judgment, see scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed in open court.
